title: Harden degraded verification behavior, silent-fallback prevention, and partial publication recovery
summary: Close the recovery-path gaps so verification failures and split publication outcomes are surfaced explicitly, block authoritative hydration when necessary, and remain recoverable without hidden fallback behavior.

acceptance.label: Verification failures move runtime state into an explicit degraded mode rather than silently falling back to stale local assumptions.
Branch-push-success/shared-publish-failure and branch-push-failure-before-shared-publish flows are durable, diagnosable, and retryable.
Repair commands and runtime recovery operate against explicit shared-ref publication state instead of inferred local heuristics.
